message:
fix(ci): resolve clippy warnings and update test snapshots

- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)] to table rendering functions
- Collapse nested if-let statements using let-chains in progress.rs
- Fix Rule alignment tests for new render behavior
- Update table/tree/rule golden and e2e test snapshots
- Add #![allow(unexpected_cfgs)] for conformance_python tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
